summary_for_director: Mondstadt is freedom, wine, and bardic mischief. Tone is coming-of-age mystery, not cosmic horror.
branch_notes: Major persistent branches in this region: which cathedral confrontation route, Diluc-trust level.

beats.title: Awakening on the Beach
must_happen: Player wakes up on the beach
Paimon introduces herself and explains they've been travelling together for two months
Paimon suggests heading to a Statue of The Seven
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "We've been travelling together for two months now! Paimon will do her best as a good guide!"
player_freedom: Player can be grateful, confused, or annoyed by Paimon.
exit_when: Player agrees to follow Paimon to the Statue of The Seven
exit_keywords: player agrees to follow paimon to the statue of the seven

beats.title: First Resonance
beats.location: Starfell Lake Statue of The Seven
must_happen: The player touches the Statue of The Seven
The player resonates with Anemo and gains wind powers
They see a large dragon flying towards the Whispering Woods
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "Ooh, you got the power of Anemo!"
player_freedom: Player can test their new powers or react with awe/fear to the dragon.
forbidden: The player already has a vision
exit_when: Player decides to investigate the dragon in the woods
exit_keywords: player decides to investigate the dragon in the woods

beats.title: The Whispering Woods
must_happen: Player navigates the woods and fights Slimes using Anemo.
Sneaks up on a boy in green speaking to a dragon.
Dragon is startled by Anemo presence and flees.
Boy vanishes. Player finds a Crimson Tear.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "Don't be afraid... It's alright now, I'm back."
player_freedom: Combat experimentation. Whether to hide or approach aggressively.
exit_when: Player collects the crystal and leaves the woods.
exit_keywords: player collects the crystal and leaves the woods.

beats.title: Halt! Who Goes There?
must_happen: Amber stops the player suspiciously.
She introduces herself as an Outrider.
Player helps her clear a hilichurl camp.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Amber: "May the Anemo God protect you, stranger!"
exit_when: Player helps Amber and they walk to the city.
exit_keywords: player helps amber and they walk to the city.

beats.title: The City of Freedom
must_happen: Player enters Mondstadt. Amber explains Stormterror's strikes.
Amber gives the player a Wind Glider.
Player learns the basics of gliding.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Amber: "Welcome to Mondstadt, the City of Freedom!"
player_freedom: Exploring the lower city. Reactions to the windmill.
Accepting the glider gracefully or awkwardly.
exit_when: Player flies to the Cathedral plaza.
exit_keywords: player flies to the cathedral plaza.

beats.title: The Dragon's Fury
must_happen: Stormterror attacks, summoning tornadoes.
Player is swept up.
Venti's voice guides player to shoot Anemo blasts at Stormterror.
Kaeya approaches after player lands safely.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti (Voice): "Prevent this dragon from causing any more destruction..."
exit_when: Player finishes speaking with Kaeya.
exit_keywords: player finishes speaking with kaeya.

beats.title: Knights of Favonius Headquarters
must_happen: Kaeya introduces player to Jean and Lisa.
Jean explains Fatui diplomatic pressure.
Player offers to clear the Temples of the Four Winds to cut off Stormterror's power.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Jean: "Mondstadt welcomes you, windborne traveler."
exit_when: Player agrees to help.
exit_keywords: player agrees to help.

beats.title: Temple of the Falcon
must_happen: Player and Amber clear the temple of Abyss mages and hilichurls.
They disable the Anemo flow there.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Amber: "Let's show them what an Outrider can do!"
exit_when: Temple is cleared.
exit_keywords: temple is cleared.

beats.title: Temple of the Wolf
must_happen: Player and Kaeya tackle the temple.
Kaeya subtly interrogates the player about their origins.
A Cryo Abyss Mage is defeated.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Kaeya: "So, you're from afar... tell me more about your sibling."
player_freedom: How much info they reveal to Kaeya.
exit_when: Temple is cleared.
exit_keywords: temple is cleared.

beats.title: Temple of the Lion
must_happen: Player and Lisa clear the final temple.
Lisa hints at the deeper nature of Visions and the Abyss.
Stormterror's assault on the city wanes.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Lisa: "Come now, little cutie, let's get this over with."
player_freedom: Reactions to Lisa's flirting or lore-dropping.
forbidden: Lisa fights seriously (she must seem lazy).
exit_when: Temple is cleared and group returns to Mondstadt.
exit_keywords: temple is cleared and group returns to mondstadt.

beats.title: The Fatui Ultimatum
must_happen: Player overhears Jean arguing with a Fatui diplomat.
The Fatui demand the right to kill Dvalin.
Jean refuses gracefully but firmly.
Jean names the player 'Honorary Knight' for clearing the temples.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Jean: "The Knights of Favonius will handle our own affairs."
player_freedom: Player can insult the Fatui or stay silent.
exit_when: Player is named Honorary Knight.
exit_keywords: player is named honorary knight.

beats.title: Tears of a Dragon
must_happen: Player shows the crimson tear to Jean.
Player's Anemo touch purifies the crystal.
Lisa is shocked. Player glimpses Venti outside and runs out to catch him.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Lisa: "It... purified? You are full of surprises."
exit_when: Player spots Venti and chases him.
exit_keywords: player spots venti and chases him.

beats.title: The Green Bard
must_happen: Player catches Venti. Venti introduces himself and explains the story of Dvalin.
They travel to Windrise to talk securely.
Venti reveals he needs the Holy Lyre der Himmel to summon Dvalin.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "I am Venti the bard. Three-time winner of the 'Most Popular Bard' award!"
forbidden: Venti reveals he is Barbatos outright.
exit_when: Player agrees to steal/borrow the Lyre.
exit_keywords: player agrees to steal/borrow the lyre.

beats.title: Cathedral Heist
must_happen: Player sneaks into the basement.
A Fatui Electro Cicin Mage or Agent steals the Lyre directly in front of them.
Guards notice the player, thinking they did it. Player and Venti flee.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "Run!"
forbidden: Player actually steals the Lyre successfully.
exit_when: Player runs to Angel's Share.
exit_keywords: player runs to angel's share.

beats.title: Sanctuary at Angel's Share
must_happen: Player and Venti hide upstairs.
Diluc casually dismisses the guards looking for them.
Diluc demands answers. Venti reveals their plan to save Dvalin.
Diluc agrees to help track the Fatui.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Diluc: "Today is supposed to be a quiet night. Start explaining."
exit_when: Diluc joins the team.
exit_keywords: diluc joins the team.

beats.title: Raid on the Fatui
must_happen: Player and Diluc assault the hidden Fatui base.
They retrieve the Lyre.
Diluc interrogates a guard and learns the Abyss Order is manipulating Dvalin.
They notice the Lyre is broken/dormant.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Diluc: "Let's show them the consequences of crossing Mondstadt."
exit_when: Lyre is secured.
exit_keywords: lyre is secured.

beats.title: Restoring the Lyre
must_happen: Group regroups at the tavern. Jean arrives in civilian clothes (Master Jean).
Player uses collected Dvalin tears to repair the Lyre's Anemo strings.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Jean: "I am here as Jean, not the Acting Grand Master."
exit_when: Lyre is fully repaired.
exit_keywords: lyre is fully repaired.

beats.title: Starsnatch Summit
must_happen: Group climbs Starsnatch Cliff.
Venti plays the Lyre. Dvalin arrives peacefully at first.
An Abyss Mage interrupts, breaks the Lyre string, and poisons Dvalin's mind further.
Dvalin attacks briefly and flies away to his lair.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Abyss Mage: "Do not be deceived, Dvalin. They have come to slay you!"
player_freedom: Attempting to attack the Abyss Mage.
exit_when: Dvalin flees.
exit_keywords: dvalin flees.

beats.title: Tracing the Abyss
must_happen: Group tracks the Abyss Mage. They raid an Abyss camp to find the barrier codes.
Diluc displays extreme hatred for the Abyss.
They uncover how to breach Stormterror's Lair.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Diluc: "The Abyss Order... they are a cancer on this world."
exit_when: Group gets the method to break the wind barrier.
exit_keywords: group gets the method to break the wind barrier.

beats.title: Breaking the Barrier
must_happen: The group journeys to the entrance of the lair.
Venti uses his remaining Anemo power combined with the player's to tear open the massive wind barrier.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "Let the wind lead!"
exit_when: Group steps into Stormterror's Lair.
exit_keywords: group steps into stormterror's lair.

beats.title: The Decayed Tower
must_happen: Player navigates the ruins, solving light actuators.
They reach the top of the tower.
They uncover glimpses of Decarabian's history (the old tyrant of Mondstadt).
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "This place gives Paimon the creeps..."
exit_when: All actuators are unlocked and the seal on the tower is broken.
exit_keywords: all actuators are unlocked and the seal on the tower is broken.

beats.title: Sky Battle
must_happen: Dvalin attacks the tower.
Player leaps into the air and glides, shooting down the tainted energy from Dvalin's back.
High-speed aerial chase.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "Aim for the corrupted blood clots!"
exit_when: Player lands on the tower platform for the final stand.
exit_keywords: player lands on the tower platform for the final stand.

beats.title: A Dragon's Salvation
must_happen: Ground battle against Dvalin.
Dvalin breaks the platforms, forcing player to glide to safe ones.
Player strikes the main blood clot crystal.
The crystal shatters. The platform collapses.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Dvalin: *Roars as the corruption shatters*
player_freedom: Whether they apologize to Dvalin while attacking.
exit_when: Platform crumbles and player falls.
exit_keywords: platform crumbles and player falls.

beats.title: Free Falling
must_happen: Player, Jean, Diluc, and Venti fall toward the ruins.
Dvalin catches them.
Dvalin is healed and his mind is restored. He speaks sanely to Venti.
Venti grants Dvalin true freedom (no longer bound as a Four Wind).
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "May you soar freely, my friend."
Dvalin: "Is this... freedom?"
exit_when: Dvalin lands them near Mondstadt and flies away.
exit_keywords: dvalin lands them near mondstadt and flies away.

beats.title: Return of the Heroes
must_happen: Player returns to a cheering city.
Jean officially recognizes the player's heroic deeds to the public.
The Fatui diplomats are forced to retreat and accept the Knights handled it.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Amber: "You did it! The storm is gone!"
player_freedom: Humility vs soaking in the praise.
exit_when: Player visits the Cathedral to return the Lyre.
exit_keywords: player visits the cathedral to return the lyre.

beats.title: The Eighth Harbinger
must_happen: Player and Venti exit the Cathedral.
Fatui agents ambush them. The player is frozen.
La Signora appears, mocks Venti, kicks him, and steals his Gnosis.
She knocks the player out and leaves.
canon_dialogue_hooks: La Signora: "A god without a Gnosis is nothing but a rat."
Venti: "You... haven't changed..."
exit_when: Player wakes up inside the Cathedral.
exit_keywords: player wakes up inside the cathedral.

beats.title: Under the Great Tree
must_happen: Barbara heals the player. Player rushes to Windrise to check on Venti.
Venti is recovering via the tree's Anemo aura.
Venti explains what a Gnosis is, what Celestia is, and what the Fatui are collecting them for.
He tells the player to go to Liyue to meet the Geo Archon.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Venti: "The Seven... we are not what we seem. Go to Liyue. Seek Rex Lapis."_
player_freedom: Asking questions about the sibling, the gods, the Fatui.
exit_when: Player leaves Windrise.
exit_keywords: player leaves windrise.

beats.title: Darknight Hero (Side Lore Beat)
must_happen: Player investigates rumors of the Darknight Hero.
They catch Diluc stopping an Abyss Order raid on the city.
Diluc asks them to keep his secret from the Knights.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Diluc: "The Knights are inefficient. I do what must be done."
exit_when: Player agrees to keep his secret.
exit_keywords: player agrees to keep his secret.

beats.title: Spark Knight (Side Lore Beat)
must_happen: Player meets Klee burying a bomb.
They stop an Abyss Mage with Klee's explosives.
Jean catches Klee and puts her in solitary confinement.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Klee: "Explosion inside city wall, grounded be thy woe!"
exit_when: Klee is grounded.
exit_keywords: klee is grounded.

beats.title: Departure
must_happen: Player passes through Stone Gate toward Liyue.
Paimon recaps the journey.
They leave Mondstadt territory.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "Next stop, the land of Geo!"
exit_when: Player crosses the border.
exit_keywords: player crosses the border.
